§6Integrated Circuit Board§f is a §bmid-tier electronic component§f.

§ePosition in Chain:§f
Microchip → §bIntegrated Circuit Board§f (this) → Military Grade → Versatile

§eTask:§f Craft 1x §bhbm:circuit§f (Integrated tier)

§eCrafting:§f
• Made in §bAssembly Machine§f or §bCircuit Press§f
• Requires Microchips and substrate materials

§eUses:§f
• Required for advanced machinery
• Stepping stone to higher circuit tiers
• Essential for automation equipment

§aTip:§f Set up dedicated production lines - you'll need many for progression.
